title: peltaria perennis
intro: Peltaria perennis, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its high levels of ascorbic acid and other bioactive compounds. Peltaria perennis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
